name: TestWaitForvFlashProjectLoaded, TestWaitForvFlashProjectUnloaded
title: TestWaitForvFlashProjectLoaded, TestWaitForvFlashProjectUnloaded
description: Waits until the given packed vFlash project (including flashware) is loaded or unloaded.

parameters.name: projectPath
parameters.description: Path to the packed vFlash project, a vflashpack file typically.
